pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'Name: ASSOCIATED-WITH'. This is a custom, non-standard concept map type being created for ICD-11 mapping support.
Task description specifies: 'Description: Indicates that a concept is clinically associated with a concept in an external terminology system'. This contains 'associated'.

Examined openmrs-module-legacyui repository structure. Found JSP file at /omod/src/main/webapp/admin/concepts/conceptMapTypeList.jsp. OpenMRS URL pattern mapping converts .list pages to .jsp files. The directory path should be 'concepts' not 'conceptmaptypes'. See: https://github.com/openmrs/openmrs-module-legacyui/tree/master/omod/src/main/webapp/admin/concepts

privileged_info_summary: ASSOCIATED-WITH is a custom concept map type (not a standard OpenMRS type) being created to support terminology mapping between local concepts and ICD-11. The standard types in OpenMRS are SAME-AS, NARROWER-THAN, and BROADER-THAN. The map type name, description containing 'associated', and the task's requirement that it not be hidden are correctly specified. However, the target URL path contains an error: the correct admin path is /openmrs/admin/concepts/conceptMapType.list, not /openmrs/admin/conceptmaptypes/conceptMapType.list (directory should be 'concepts' not 'conceptmaptypes').
